title: Darwin Hanneman Launch Kit
summary: Darwin Hanneman is a relationship-first commercial funding partner backed by Moonshine Capital. His launch strategy focuses on referral partners who already know business owners with funding problems.
safePositioning: Darwin helps business owners explore funding options that may be available based on business profile. Provider criteria apply, and approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.
restrictedPositioning: Do not position Darwin as guaranteeing approvals, specific rates, funding amounts, timelines, qualification, or outcomes.
launchObjectives: Build referral relationships with professionals who already know business owners with funding problems.
Give referral partners a responsible next step when traditional financing is delayed, unavailable, or not the right fit today.
Use compliant language that keeps expectations clear and avoids unsafe claims.
Create a repeatable launch kit structure that future Partners can clone.
